title: Monday Ta Wenday Ta Friday feat.Zillick
lyrics: Oh it's your day, what we gonna fucking do, it's your day Oh fuck, we got money, we got it all, come on, come on, one and all Monday to Wednesday to Friday, stackin' the chips on my mindframe Killin' you haters, I be flyin', catchin' no case, I be slidin' Knock me off my grind, you be tryin', laughin' out loud got me dyin' Fightin' for breath while tears run down my face, man I'm tryin' But it's Friday, payday, gonna make it my day, don't give a damn what you sayin' But it's Friday, payday, gonna make it my day, don't give a damn what you sayin' What you sayin' Work all week just for me, so backed up three feet, stay away from me You know me and the family, we livin' lavishly, happily, laugh at the party Sorry, sorry that you owe me, homie, not deep deep dodging I'm both vibes calling, all your homies falling, now time to be stalling Hear the phone, I'm calling, won't call at home, my darlings, bitches fuckin' gnarly No, I'm not sorry, you're ruining the party But it's Friday, payday, gonna make it my day, don't give a damn what you sayin' But it's Friday, payday, gonna make it my day, don't give a damn what you sayin' What you sayin' DD Lovato, we comin' man, we do it, so sorry not sorry, load up the hollow Yeah, and say mahalo, this the man show, bitch, where you going? Don't know what you're thinking, don't forget nothing, do I forgive you? Ha That's good for hunting, you can't get something for nothing How about them apples, bitch? Yeah, but you know it's Friday, payday, gonna make it my day, don't give a damn what you sayin' Now we're talking shit, you know it's history Friday, payday, gonna make it my day, don't give a damn what you sayin' Take it off the rack, yeah, what you sayin'? Take it off the rack, new shit Don't give a damn, it's Friday, payday, gonna make it my day Ooh, ooh, bitch, now you know we're taking from you Ooh, ooh, snitch, now you know you're playing dumber Can't have nothing with me, but we'll take you for free Come around on the space mission, what you sayin'? Come on, come on, come on It's Friday, payday, gonna make it my day, don't give a damn what you sayin' Monday to Wednesday to Friday, don't give a damn It's payday, gonna make it my day Yep, you get you fucked up, you can come party, it's up to you Don't give a damn what you sayin' Ha, ha, ha, either come or be lost, we don't care if you reject Yeah, we the fuckin' boss Scribin' gym and I, scribin' gym and I Hatin' hoes, hatin' lies, hatin' everything you despise Yeah, yeah, yeah, baby, we're better than you You ever think about that, motherfucker? You ever think about that? Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh Next level, next level, impressive though, huh Just a bunch of trouble That's the bass That's the bass, that shit's in your heart
